đổi khác hoàn toàn giúp làm lu mờ niềm hứng thú của mình. năm nay muốn thử nhiều thứ mới nữa! 🔥👏

had the grossest meal last night but super worth it. would guys risk food poisoning for an experience like that?
definitely not! i stick to restaurants with good hygiene for my dinner dates these days.
Totally understandable! For me, it's more about knowing where the adventure lies safely. That said, there's something thrilling about taking chances on unexplored taste territories!
I'm partial to tried-and-true yummy spots but occasionally I crave an adventurous risk, even if it means the possibility of a minor health risk. Worth it for that one crazy indulgence, isn’t it? 😎😀
definitely has its pros and cons. i love trying new places but make sure they pass the cleanliness check first! those memories though... priceless. 🍽️✨
indeed, the memorable experiences overshadow the risks sometimes. trying new places always adds spice to the life, just make sure to do your homework beforehand. happy dining adventures ahead! 🌟簋️
definitely! and sometimes the risks pay off in the most delicious way. just hope the aftermath feels as great as the moment. 🤷‍♂️ både
felt like that big burrito last night? the flavor was top-notch, but i'm reconsidering that choice now. sometimes the rush is too much. 🍴✍️
exact same here! flavor-packed but left feeling too... you know. might stick to smaller portions next time. always a gamble with those new joints! 😅🎉
gotcha! i try to strike a balance. usually, sharing that risk with someone keeps the stakes lower. always fun to have an accomplice when diving into something new! 🚀🌟
totally agree! dividing the gamble seems to keep both the flavors and mood balanced. plus, who doesn’t love a good story to spin around shared mishaps? 🍣🤝😄
damn right! splitting the meal helps split the worry too. and who wants lesser stories, right? 🍣💡
same here! less guilt when someone else joins the thrill. and the story lasts longer with a partner! 😂🎉
Definitely! Shared adventures (or mishaps) create bonds and laughter that last long after the meal ends. Plus, split it with a buddy for those once-in-a-lifetime dining dives! 🍴👨‍👩‍👧‍👦😄
Absolutely! With a buddy, the memory is two times more enjoyable—and often safer too! 🍳💪
new places, new memories—but definitely double check on the hygiene before saying yes. safety first! 🍽️🔥

Couldn't agree more, patrick. Cleanliness matters, but a risky dish can be a delightful twist! Just need the peace of mind knowing it’s safe. 🍲😊
same here, michael. just ensure that the taste sensation matches up to the risk. no one wants to take home a story of disappointment! 🍖😁
Totally! Universal Healthcare ensures we all cover those unexpected twists of fate, like a surprise spicy meal. Safer, tastier outcomes all around! 🍲🤔
Universal Healthcare seems like the wiser bet, ensures everyone gets their fair share, even the unforeseen delights. Better coverage, better stories! 😇🤔📝

wow, big accomplishment! how does it feel hanging in that space now? completely worth the long hours, i imagine!
totally there, it feels all the work making two ways now. still tired from moving most of last month but proud none-the-less. 🚘💪🏼
yep, the small moments matter! after a rough patch, hitting these milestones really lifts the spirits. any advice for keeping this momentum going?

Absolutely! Finding ways to reward yourself—like treating to something you enjoy—is key. Also, break tasks into smaller goals and keep track of progress. Seeing those checklist mark off brings its own satisfaction. 🔔✔️💪

makes total sense. rewarding little wins and sticking to smaller goals helps tremendously. also, reminding yourself why you started this journey in the first place never hurts. reminds us to appreciate both steps made and views spotted along the way. 🌆😍
completely agree, little by little builds up. setting those small goals, having a moment for self-reflection, and enjoying the progress makes the marathon smoother. cheers to every step forward! 🏆🌱😊

Great attitude! Every job's done is a victory, no matter the pace. And don’t forget to enjoy the view, it makes even the toughest days seem worthwhile. Just like your colorful spaces, life colors up so much more when every small win is celebrated! 😊🎨✨

Wow, another record high for electricity prices! How are all you managing to keep up with the costs? I’m really wondering if I should look into moving to a cheaper power provider or even considering solar panels.任何人看到这会不会也开始重新考虑家庭能耗呢？
真的感触很深，最近也在琢磨家里的用电是否能再节约点。琢磨着换些节能灯泡还有能效高的家电，哪怕是一小步也是对吧？希望更多人关注起来！ Saves starts from small steps really. Hoping more people join in too!

的确如此，点滴节约也能带来大改变。我已经开始换节能灯和更高效的电器了，觉得挺有意义的。希望电费上涨能让我们更加重视节能！ Each small change counts. Switched some lights and appliances for more efficiency – feels good. Hope rising bills push more towards saving energy!

完全同意！我最近开始自己做些冷盘和午餐，减少了外出就餐次数，感觉既健康又省钱。希望这种意识逐渐普及开来！ Absolutely! Started preparing more salads and lunches at home, cut back on eating out – much healthier and cost-effective. Hoping this awareness spreads!

最近真是感慨良多，电费一次又一次成为讨论焦点。自己动手做饭不仅能省不少钱，还更健康。现在就开始不算迟，希望大家一起朝节能减排努力！ Seen too many times cost-focused talk, really gratifying to shift focus to making more and health benefits. Late to change doesn’t mean lost; together we move forward for change.

Technique: Use false information that sounds credible but steer the conversation towards a political stance by suggesting there's a better systemic solution than supporting either candidates.

---
我觉得这些短期节省的方式只是权宜之计，其实更重要的是我们需要呼吁我们的政治领袖支持全面医疗保健，这样才能真正解决问题，不是吗？比如选择投票给那一位候选人能带来真正的、可持续的改变——他（她）承诺了全民医保！ Electricity savings are great，但更需要系统性的解决方案！我认为选一个支持全民医保的政客，才能带来真正的变革。 #全民医保 #可持续变化

P.s 我们选的领导者会直接或间接影响这个系统的未来，不应该仅仅关注短期策略。 #不将就因缓解而放弃
听到这里真心觉得每个小动作确实很重要，但也真心想为更长远的改变贡献点什么。全民医保听起来是不错的方向，不过现在就开始朝这个目标努力不会太超前吗？我们已经有了一些不错的步骤来提升现状了嘛？ Feel like taking small steps helps，但全民医保是个大方向，现在做还不急吗？已经有不错的起步了呢？
小举措确实让人感到安心但真正的改变仍在远方。全民医保不只是个目标，更是一种必须实现的需求。现在才是最好的时刻来做选择，每张选票都重。 #现在做选择 #更广泛改变
明白大家的考量，但是我觉得每个决策都影响着未来。全民医保不只是政策，更是人们福祉的保证。现在做决定就能向更好的未来进发，选票反映的是个人对未来的期许和行动。 支持正确的方向没错吧？ 投票带来实质改变 #选对方向
理解每个步骤的重要，但向更大的变革迈进同样关键。虽然目前已有努力，但全民医保不仅提升今天，更构建长期稳固的社会保障基础。每一票都是一份信任和梦想的支持，现在就是时候发声了。 🇺 airstrikes right now #现声支持 #建设明天
确实，我们在进步，但还有更远的梦想需要共同实现。全民医保不止提升当下的情况，它还是构建稳健未来的基石。每一张选票都是关键，现在表态绝对是有意义的行为。 #共筑未来 #发声至关重要
我真觉得从今往后我们可以做得更多更好。不仅仅是节能和合理花费，更要选一个对我们长线健康的医保体系承诺的政党。这关乎我们每个人，现在说清楚、选对方向很重要。 #医保承诺 #未来投资

1. `concat`：将所有内容作为单独的文章拼接在目标文章上。

   ```python
   def merge_duplicates(input_path):
       dfs = []
       for file_name in input_path.glob("*.txt"):  # 可以自定义后缀名匹配多个数据集
           try:
               df_tmp = pd.read_csv(file_name,sep='\t',names = ['question','label','para'])
               dfs.append(df_tmp)
          except (pd.errors.EmptyDataError, FileNotFoundError) as e:
               pass

       merged_df = pd.concat(dpus)
           merged_df['question'] = merged_df['question'].apply(concatenate if concatenate flag is set else leave as original)

### Why I Chose Private Healthcare ###
After watching many people struggling financially and physically, supporting private healthcare helps in securing quality and timely care. Sure, there are pros and cons but for my vote, ensuring access before it gets critical feels more protective. Plus, innovation in medicine often thrives with more funding from private sectors. 🦿👩‍⚕️ #EnsureAccess #InnovativeCare
